name: Flutter Web Dev Environment
postCreateCommand: git config --global --add safe.directory /opt/flutter && curl -sL https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/linux/flutter_linux_3.24.5-stable.tar.xz | tar xJ && sudo mv flutter /opt/flutter && sudo ln -s /opt/flutter/bin/flutter /usr/local/bin/flutter && sudo ln -s /opt/flutter/bin/dart /usr/local/bin/dart
